games.name: Diablo IV
games.textSignature: Diablo IV New Expansion Available Now Action RPG Purchase Expansion Learn More New to Diablo IV? Welcome to Hell Discover the critically acclaimed franchise that defined the Action RPG genre. As the battle between the High Heavens and Burning Hells rages on, so too does your chance to fight for good to prevail. Hatred devours Sanctuary as evil spreads and a new wave of cultists and worshippers arise to embrace Lilith’s coming. Only a brave few dare to face this threat and bring light to the all-consuming darkness. Latest Updates What’s New in Sanctuary LORD OF HATRED™ New Expansion Confront Mephisto, the Prime Evil and Lord of Hatred, in the all-new expansion Lord of Hatred. Battle across the ancient islands of Skovos, uncover two new playable classes, and face the final reckoning in Diablo IV’s most ambitious chapter yet. Discover new dungeons, and endgame activities that will make you risk it all for Sanctuary. View Expansion New Season: Season of Death Awakening New Season Tear open
features: Tear open Ruptures to face seasonal challenges
Conquer completely redesigned Realmwalkers
Confront a corrupted Reaper for a chance at earning Mythic Unique rewards
Hunt the Death Cult in the Seasonal Realm
Explore the Lord of Hatred expansion featuring the ancient islands of Skovos and two new playable classes

games.name: Torchlight: Infinite
features: New seasonal mechanic: Afterlight, involving the Guiding Lantern, purifying Wraiths, and gathering relics
New Hero Trait: Dance of the Deep for Tide Whisper Selena, focusing on Terra skills
New progression system: Nether King's Divinity, introducing a new kind of Divinity Slate to brand Divine Remnants
New challenge mode: Divine Ascent, a timed climb against a three-minute timer featuring floor bosses and random events
System and visual upgrades, including Lunaria going core and new Trade House QoL options
